message:
fix(reactor): colocate token and fd maps in EpollReactor, eliminate O(n) fd scan

Introduce ReactorState struct that bundles the token→RegistrationInfo map with
a new fd→Token reverse index. This replaces the previous design where only the
token map existed and duplicate-fd detection required an O(n) linear scan via
.values().any(). The reverse index makes register() O(1) for both token and fd
duplicate checks.

Deregister now properly cleans up both maps in all paths (success, ENOENT,
EBADF-with-closed-fd) to prevent stale reverse-index entries from blocking
future registrations on the same fd number.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
